top_signals.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iran will pay for killing U.S. service members
top_signals.summary: The U.S. has bombed Iran for nine consecutive nights in retaliation for repeated attacks on oil tankers transiting the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gilts Rattled on Andy Burnham’s First Day as Fiscal Fears Return
top_signals.summary: UK government bonds plunged after new Prime Minister Andy Burnham unnerved investors on his first day in the job over his approach to the country’s finances.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Oil Tanker Appears to Halt in Hormuz After Iran Targets Vessels - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil Tanker Appears to Halt in Hormuz After Iran Targets Vessels  Bloomberg.com

top_signals.title: Policy paper: EM on customs duty on distance imported goods sales (C(2026)2760)
top_signals.summary: The government's summary of a Commission Delegated Regulation as regards elements related to the temporary customs duty on distance sales of imported goods.

top_signals.title: India says allegedly leaked nuclear plant files pose no safety risk
top_signals.summary: Documents that the World Leaks cybercrime group claimed to leak from the Kudankulam Nuclear Power Plant do not contain information pertaining to safety or security, Indian officials said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
